title: limonium sinuatum subsp. bonduellei
intro: Limonium sinuatum subsp. bonduellei, also known as the sea lavender, is a plant species within the Limonium genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Limonium sinuatum subsp. bonduellei can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
